catalog_content:
Item Name: Healthworks Psyllium Husk Powder Organic - 32 Oz / 2 Lbs - Raw - Certified Organic - Finely Ground Powder from India - Keto, Vegan & Non-GMO - Fiber Support
Bullet Point 1: ORGANIC PSYLLIUM HUSK POWDER: Healthworks Psyllium Husk Powder is a fiber-packed powder that is simple to soak up. Just add one rounded teaspoon to 12oz of water, juice, soy or rice drink, milk or smoothies and consume right away. You may want to add more liquid to the mixture if it becomes too thick.
Bullet Point 2: HEALTHY ALTERNATIVE & COUNTLESS USES: Healthworks Psyllium Husk Powder is naturally gluten free and contains around 4g of fiber in each teaspoon. Goes great with water, juice, soy/rice milk, smoothies, breads, baked goods & more! Raw, Juicing, Vegan, Paleo, Keto, Clean Eating, Wellness, Active, Biohacking, Life Hacking, Yoga, Spiritual, Blending, Non-GMO, Plant Based.
Bullet Point 3: MANY BENEFITS & NUTRIENTS: Cleanse your System! Psyllium is one of the best sources of soluble and insoluble fiber which help support intestinal and colon health as well as with healthy stool formation. Suitable for all diets including, vegan, gluten-free, paleo, low-carb, keto friendly and more!
Bullet Point 4: NATURAL SOURCE: Our Psyllium Husk is hand selected from small sustainable farmers to provide a truly exquisite organic powder to your front door.
Value: 32.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic superfood product with USDA Organic certification, positioned as a high-quality dietary supplement. Large 32 oz size and multiple dietary compatibility claims (keto, vegan, non-GMO) support premium pricing. Clean, sustainable sourcing and versatile use cases justify a higher price point compared to standard fiber supplements.
